test_title: overlay aparece con imagen cuando el VAST devuelve nonLinear válido
suite_title: Pause Ad VAST — Parseo de respuesta válida
error_message:
expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)

Expected: >= 1
Received:    0

Call Log:
- Timeout 10000ms exceeded while waiting on the predicate
root_cause: The feature branch feature/issue-586-pausead-implementation has NOT been merged to develop. The player deployed at https://player.cdn.mdstrm.com/lightning_player/develop/api.js is the develop build, which does not contain the PauseAd component (src/view/video/components/pauseAd/index.jsx), the pauseAd atoms, or pauseAdFetch.js. The .pause-ad__asset element never appears in the DOM because the code that renders it does not exist in the deployed bundle.
suspected_cause: Test expects .pause-ad__asset to appear after pausing; player at develop branch has no PauseAd component in VideoView, so the DOM element is never created regardless of VAST response.
